name: Kitchen Display System
description: Kitchen display system (KDS) for restaurant ticket routing. Horizontal ticket rail with station-specific views and fire timers.

page_briefs.kitchen: Horizontal KDS ticket rail streaming incoming orders left-to-right with fire timers, course separators, and bump controls. Compact KPI header shows tickets-in-window, average prep time, longest ticket, and on-time percentage.
page_briefs.stations: Grid of ticket cards filtered by station (grill, saute, cold, fry, pastry). Each card shows table, course, items with modifiers, elapsed time, and bump button. Color-coded by age.

shells.sidebar-main: Sidebar navigation with main content area for kitchen operations
